findings.source: Table 2 dsPIC33AK512MC510 Family Device Features (page 9): row dsPIC33AK512MC506 - Pins=64, Packages VQFN/TQFP
Table 2 (page 9) MC506 row I2C=3; also page 4 features bullet: 'Three I2C Modules'
Table 2 (page 9) MC506 row SPI=4; also page 4 features: 'Four 4-Wire SPI Modules'
Table 2 (page 9) MC506 row UART=3; also page 4 features: 'Three Protocol UARTs'
Table 2 (page 9) MC506 row ADC External Analog Inputs=23
Table 2 (page 9) MC506 row Op Amplifiers=3; also page 5 features: 'Three Rail-to-Rail 100 MHz Operational Amplifiers'
Table 2 (page 9) MC506 row 'DACs with Comparators'=4 (MC family); page 5 features state 'Up to Eight 5 nS Analog Comparators with 12-Bit PDM DACs'
Table 2 (page 9) MC506 row DAC Outputs=2; page 5: 'Up to two DAC output buffers'
Page 5 Safety Features: 'Windowed Watchdog Timer (WDT)'
Page 1 Operating Conditions: 'DC to 200 MHz'
Memory Features list (page 1) describes only 'Up to 512 Kbytes of Program Flash Memory'; no separate auxiliary/data Flash mentioned for MC family
Table 2 (page 9) MC506 row CLC=10; also page 4 Peripheral Features: 'Ten Configurable Logic Cells (CLC)'
Page 1 Operating Conditions: '-40C to +85C / +125C / +150C'
Page 1 Operating Conditions: '3.0V to 3.6V: -40C to +150C, DC to 200 MHz'; page 6 Qualification AEC-Q100 Grade 0 -40 to +150
Table 1 (page 2): PIC32MZ0512EFE100 row, Program Memory=512 KB
Table 1 (page 2): 100-pin row for PIC32MZ0512EFE100; Pin Tables 3 and 4 list 100-pin TQFP and TFBGA
Table 1 (page 2) shared 100-pin row: I/O Pins=78; also Packages table page 1: '100-pin TQFP/TFBGA: 78 I/O Pins'
Table 1 (page 2) shared 100-pin row: I2C=5; also page 1 features: 'Five I2C modules'
Table 1 (page 2) shared 100-pin row: UART=6; page 1 features: 'Six UART modules'
No Op Amp peripheral mentioned in Features (page 1) or Table 1
Page 1 Advanced Analog states only '12-bit ADC' and 'Two comparators with 32 programmable voltage references' (CVREF); no DAC peripheral listed
No DAC outputs listed in features or family table
Table 1 (page 2) RTCC=Y for 100-pin; page 1 Timers section: 'Real-Time Clock and Calendar (RTCC) module'
Page 1 Operating Conditions: '2.1V to 3.6V, -40C to +85C, DC to 252 MHz'; Core: 252 MHz
Table 1 (page 2): PIC32MZ0512EFE100 specific row 'PIC32MZ0512EFE100 0 N Y 8/12' - Boot Flash Memory=0 KB for the E variant
Table 1-1 Configuration Summary (page 3): SAM3N0A Flash=32 Kbytes
Table 1-1 Configuration Summary (page 3): SAM3N0A SRAM=8 Kbytes
Page 2 Memories section lists only embedded Flash, embedded SRAM, and 16 KB ROM; no EEPROM peripheral
Table 1-1 Configuration Summary (page 3): SAM3N0A USART column = 1
No op amp mentioned in Peripherals or Analog sections (pages 1-8)
Table 1-1 Configuration Summary (page 3): SAM3N0A DAC column = '_' (none); SAM3N0A is 48-pin, no DAC
Table 1-1 (page 3): SAM3N0A has no DAC; the 64/100-pin variants have 1 DAC channel (10-bit DAC)
Page 1 Description: 'an RTC'; page 2 features: 'Low-power Real-time Clock (RTC) with calendar and alarm features'; block diagrams page 4-6 show RTC
Page 1 Description: 'maximum speed of 48 MHz'; page 2 Core: 'ARM Cortex-M3 revision 2.0 running at up to 48 MHz'
Page 2 Memories: 'From 16 to 256 Kbytes embedded Flash, 128-bit wide access, memory accelerator, single plane' - no aux flash

Note: PIC32MX320F064H is NOT covered in this datasheet (covers 330/350/370/430/450/470). Closest part is PIC32MX330F064H. Family features (page 1) mention only ADC, comparators, CVREF, CTMU - no Op Amps
PIC32MX320F064H not covered in this datasheet. Family features (page 1) list '32 programmable voltage references' (CVREF) but no DAC peripheral
PIC32MX320F064H not in datasheet. Family features list no DAC outputs
Page 1 features list 'Real-Time Clock and Calendar (RTCC) module'; Table 1 RTCC=Y for all family devices
Page 1 Clock Management features: 'Independent Watchdog Timer'
Page 1 Operating Conditions: '0C to +70C (DC to 120 MHz)'; Core: 120 MHz/150 DMIPS MIPS32 M4K
Table 1 (page 2) note 1: 'All devices feature 12 KB of Boot Flash memory' - shown as +12 in Program Memory column
Pages 1-2 Memories section: only embedded Flash, embedded Multi-port SRAM, TCM, and 16 KB ROM; no EEPROM
Pages 1-2 features list AFEC ADC, DAC, ACC analog comparator only; no operational amplifier peripheral
Page 2 Peripherals: 'One 2-channel, 12-bit, 1 Msps-per-channel Digital-to-Analog Controller (DAC)'; Table 1-2 (page 14) ATSAME70Q19 DAC Channels=2 (one DAC module, 2 channels)
Table 1-2 (page 14) ATSAME70Q19: DAC (Channels)=2; page 2 confirms 'One 2-channel, 12-bit DAC'
Page 1 System: 'RTC with Gregorian calendar mode, waveform generation in low-power modes'; section 27 Real-time Clock (RTC)
Page 1 System: 'Power-on-Reset (POR), Brown-out Detector (BOD) and Dual Watchdog for safe operation'; sections 24 WDT and 25 RSWDT
Page 1 Core: 'Arm Cortex-M7 running at up to 300 MHz'

Page 1 Memories: 'Up to 2048 Kbytes embedded Flash with unique identifier and user signature for user-defined data' - no separate auxiliary/data flash; only one Flash region. ATSAME70Q19 has 512KB Flash per Table 1-2
Table 2 (page 4) row dsPIC33CH64MP506 Main core: Flash=64K (Secondary core has 24K PRAM, not Flash)
Table 2 (page 4) row dsPIC33CH64MP506 Pins=64; pin diagram page 12 shows 64-Pin TQFP/QFN
Table 2 (page 4) row dsPIC33CH64MP506 Main core GPIO=53
Table 2 (page 4): Main has 2 I2C, Secondary has 1 I2C, total=3; page 2 features: 'Three I2C Modules: Two for Main, One for Secondary'
Table 2 (page 4): Main UART=2, Secondary UART=1, total=3; page 2 features: 'Three UART Modules: Two for Main core, One for Secondary core'
Page 2 Advanced Analog Features list 'Three PGA Modules' but does NOT list operational amplifiers; PGAs are not Op Amps. Main features summary (page 1) does not mention op amps
Table 2 (page 4) dsPIC33CH64MP506: Main '12-Bit DAC/Analog CMP Module'=1, Secondary=3, total=4; also page 2: 'Four DAC/Analog Comparator Modules: One for Main, Three for Secondary'
Table 1 Main and Secondary Core Features (page 3): 'DAC Output Buffer' row Shared=1 (one DAC output buffer shared between cores)
Page 2 Safety Features: 'WDT (Watchdog Timer)'; Table 1 (page 3) Watchdog Timer: Main=1, Secondary=1
Page 1 lists 'Main Core with 64-128 Kbytes of Program Flash' and 'Secondary Core with 24 Kbytes of Program RAM (PRAM)' - no separate auxiliary Flash; secondary uses RAM not Flash
Table 2 (page 4) row dsPIC33CH64MP506: Main CLC=4, Secondary CLC=4, total=8
Page 1 Operating Conditions: '-40C to +125C' and '-40C to +150C'
Page 1 Operating Conditions: '3V to 3.6V, -40C to +150C: Main Core: DC to 60 MIPS, Secondary Core: DC to 60 MIPS'
Table 1 (page 3) row dsPIC33EV32GM003: Pins=36; pin diagram page 7 shows 36-Pin UQFN
Table 1 (page 3): I2C column for 003 family rows = 1; also page 2: 'One I2C module (up to 1 Mbaud)'
Table 1 (page 3): SPI=2 for 003 family rows; also page 2: 'Two SPI modules (15 MHz)'
Table 1 (page 3): UART=2 for 003 family rows; page 2 features: 'Two Enhanced Addressable UART modules'
Table 1 (page 3): ADC Inputs column for 003 family rows = 13
Table 1 (page 3): Op Amp/Comparators=3/4 for 003 row, meaning 3 Op Amps and 4 Comparators; page 1 features: 'Up to Four Op Amp/Comparators with Direct Connection to the ADC module'
Page 1 Analog features: 'Additional dedicated comparator and 7-bit Digital-to-Analog Converter (DAC)' - one 7-bit DAC for comparator references
The 7-bit DAC is internal for comparator reference; no DAC output buffer pin mentioned in features. Pin diagrams do not show DACOUT pins
Page 1 Clock Management: 'Independent Watchdog Timer (WDT)' and 'System Windowed Watchdog Timer (DMT)'

Page 1 mentions 'Provides a Boot Flash Segment in addition to the existing General Flash Segment' as part of intermediate security feature - this is a partition of main Flash, not separate auxiliary Flash
Page 1 Operating Conditions list '-40C to +125C' and '-40C to +150C'
Page 1 Operating Conditions: '4.5V to 5.5V, -40C to +150C, DC to 40 MIPS'

ATMEGA325 is NOT covered by this datasheet (datasheet covers ATmega3208/3209 megaAVR 0-series). The ATmega3208/3209 family does not list any operational amplifiers; only an Analog Comparator (AC). For ATMEGA325 specifically, this PDF does not apply
ATMEGA325 not in this datasheet. ATmega3208/3209 Table 2 (page 3) shows DAC (outputs) = '-' (none) for all family members
ATMEGA325 not in this datasheet. ATmega3208/3209 has no DAC outputs
ATMEGA325 not in this datasheet. ATmega3208/3209 has Real-Time Counter (RTC) module
ATMEGA325 not in this datasheet. ATmega3208/3209 has Window Watchdog Timer (WDT)
ATMEGA325 not in this datasheet. ATmega3208/3209 max frequency is 20 MHz per Table 2
ATMEGA325 not in this datasheet
ATMEGA325 not in this datasheet. ATmega3208/3209 industrial -40C, extended -40C
ATMEGA325 not in this datasheet. ATmega3208/3209 industrial +85C, extended +125C
Pages 1-3 Memory Architecture and Peripherals lists only L1/L2 cache, internal SRAM, internal ROM, external DDR/QSPI/eMMC; no EEPROM peripheral. SAMA5D2 is an MPU using external memory
Pages 1-4 features and block diagram list ADC, ACC analog comparator, but no operational amplifier peripheral

Page 3 features list 'One 12-channel, 12-bit, Analog-to-Digital Converter (ADC) with resistive touchscreen capability' and 'One Analog Comparator Controller (ACC)'; no DAC peripheral mentioned. Block diagram (page 7) shows 12-ch 12-bit ADC but no DAC
No DAC outputs in features or block diagram
Page 2 System: 'secure Real-Time Clock (RTC) with clock calibration'
Page 2 System: 'independent Watchdog Timer (WDT)'; page 3 Safety: 'Independent watchdog'
SAMA5D2 has no embedded Flash; it is an MPU using external DDR/QSPI/eMMC/NAND Flash. Internal memory is SRAM and ROM only
Page 1: 'Selected members of the SAMA5D2 series are qualified for extended industrial temperature range operation (-40C to 105C external temperature)'
Page 1: 'extended industrial temperature range operation (-40C to 105C external temperature)'

dsPIC33EP128GS805 is NOT covered by this datasheet (covers only dsPIC33EP16GS202 and dsPIC33EP32GS202 - 28-pin parts with 16K/32K Flash). The 805 (80-pin, 128K) part is in a different datasheet. The 202 family has 0 op amps (only PGAs and comparators)
dsPIC33EP128GS805 not in this datasheet. The GS202 family has 'Dedicated 12-bit DAC for each analog comparator' (=2 DACs) per page 1, but the 805 variant cannot be verified from this PDF
dsPIC33EP128GS805 not in this datasheet
dsPIC33EP128GS805 not in this datasheet. The GS202 family has 'Independent Watchdog Timer (WDT)' per page 1
dsPIC33EP128GS805 not in this datasheet
dsPIC33EP128GS805 not in this datasheet. The GS202 family operating conditions: -40C to +85C and -40C to +125C per page 1
dsPIC33EP128GS805 not in this datasheet
